## Epic

Page Design Issues (Dummy Data Only)

## Description

- Standardize validation patterns for required, format, range, and async-like checks (mock)
- Provide components for field-level, section-level, and form-level errors
- Ensure screen reader-friendly error announcements
- Design spec (must use; measurable):
  - Tokens per Issue 3
  - Error text 14px; color #EF4444; icon optional 16px
  - Invalid fields include aria-invalid and described-by links
  - Summary banner appears on submit if errors exist

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Validation helpers and examples created
- [ ] Applied to at least 3 forms
- [ ] A11y checks pass for errors
- [ ] PR includes screenshots of error states

## Suggested GitHub labels

`frontend`, `forms`, `ux`, `priority-high`
